title: People Record
description: Schema for a person in the learning engineering people search registry.

first_name.description: Given name, parsed from display_name when possible

last_name.description: Family name, parsed from display_name when possible

display_name.description: Full name as they publish or present; falls back to github_login

bio.description: Profile bio from source system; used for triage and keyword extraction

job_title.description: Current role title; may be blank if not available from source

organization.description: Employer or institution; @ prefix stripped for GitHub company fields

department.description: Lab, team, or unit within the organization

email.description: Primary contact email; omit or leave blank if not public

orcid.description: ORCID identifier for academic publication linkage

location.description: Freetext location string as provided by source (e.g. 'Baltimore, MD')

primary_topic.description: Topic ID from the project ontology (e.g. T13)

keywords.description: Freetext tags extracted from bio or manual curation

triage_reason.description: Short explanation of the triage decision

provenance.description: Where and how this record was obtained

query.description: Search query or API call that surfaced this person

source_url.description: URL of the search result or profile page

retrieved_date.description: ISO 8601 date the record was first retrieved, e.g. 2026-04-14

notes.description: Any additional context about the data source or retrieval

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date of last modification to this record
